Cardiac Range – Franchise Available Across AP

Cardiac & Anti-Hypertensive Pharma Franchise in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma offers a pharma franchise for the cardiac and anti-hypertensive range across Andhra Pradesh. Our flagship product Telsenim-40 (Telmisartan 40mg) with proprietary Smartdose™ technology delivers 24-hour blood pressure control — a proven, widely prescribed anti-hypertensive that cardiologists and physicians across AP trust.

💊 Telmisartan 40mg (Smartdose™) ✅ WHO GMP Certified ❤️ 24-Hour BP Control 📍 AP-wide franchise available
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp Full Franchise Details
Market Opportunity

Cardiac & Hypertension: AP's Fastest-Growing Therapeutic Segment

Cardiovascular disease and hypertension are the leading chronic conditions across Andhra Pradesh's coastal belt — driven by sedentary lifestyles, dietary habits, stress, and a genetic predisposition in the local population. Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Kakinada, and Rajahmundry have large specialist bases where cardiologists and physicians prescribe anti-hypertensives in high volumes.

Telmisartan is consistently among the top-three ARB molecules prescribed in India, with growing acceptance at both GP and specialist levels due to its once-daily dosing, 24-hour coverage, and metabolic benefits including renal protection in diabetic patients. A telmisartan product from a quality-certified company is an easy franchise to grow.

  • Hypertension affects an estimated 30–35% of adults across AP coastal belt cities
  • Telmisartan is a top-prescribed ARB in India — wide doctor familiarity
  • Once-daily dosing drives strong patient compliance and repeat prescriptions
  • Dual benefit: BP control + renal/CV protection in diabetic patients
  • Cardiologists, physicians, and diabetologists all prescribe this class
  • Combination variants (with Amlodipine, HCTZ) extend the range further
Cardiac Portfolio

Crasenim Pharma Cardiac Range Products

Telsenim-40 — flagship cardiac product
Composition: Telmisartan 40mg Technology: Smartdose™ WHO GMP Certified
Franchise Available

Indications

  • Essential hypertension — single or add-on therapy
  • Cardiovascular risk reduction in high-risk patients
  • Diabetic nephropathy — renal protection
  • Microalbuminuria in type 2 diabetes with hypertension

Smartdose™ Advantages

  • True 24-hour blood pressure control with single daily dose
  • Smooth, sustained drug release — avoids peak-trough fluctuations
  • Reduced adverse effects vs immediate-release alternatives
  • Better morning surge control — reduces early AM cardiac event risk
Combination Variant

Telsenim-AM

Telmisartan + Amlodipine combination. For patients with hypertension requiring dual CCB + ARB therapy. Strong uptake among cardiologists managing complex BP cases.

Combination Variant

Telsenim-H

Telmisartan + Hydrochlorothiazide. For hypertension patients who require additional diuretic effect alongside ARB therapy. Widely prescribed as step-up therapy.

Franchise

Take the Cardiac Range Franchise in Your AP District

For Franchise Partners

PCD Franchise – Telmisartan Range

Own the exclusive rights to market Telsenim-40 and variants in your district. High-margin, repeat-prescription product ideal for franchise partners with a cardiologist and physician network.

For MRs

Commission-Based Cardiac MR

Promote Telsenim-40 to cardiologists, physicians, and diabetologists in your area. Earn monthly commission on prescriptions. Strong detailing support provided.

For Distributors

Cardiac Range Stockist

Stock and distribute the Telsenim range to retail pharmacies and hospital dispensaries across your district. Consistent demand ensures reliable stock turnover.

For Cardiologists & Physicians

Why Telsenim-40 for Your Hypertensive Patients?

24-Hour Protection

True Once-Daily Coverage

Telsenim-40's Smartdose™ formulation ensures consistent plasma levels throughout 24 hours — including the critical early-morning period when BP surges and cardiac events peak.

Dual Benefit

BP Control + Renal Protection

Telmisartan's dual mechanism (AT1 receptor blockade + PPAR-γ agonism) provides BP reduction plus metabolic and renal benefits particularly valuable in diabetic hypertensive patients.

WHO GMP Quality

Consistent Batch Quality

Manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS under WHO GMP standards — consistent Telmisartan bioavailability batch-to-batch, ensuring predictable clinical response for your patients.

Patient Access

Affordable for AP Patients

Competitive pricing ensures your Telsenim-40 prescription is actually dispensed and continued by patients — improving long-term BP control outcomes in your practice.

FAQs

Cardiac Range Franchise – FAQ

What is the telmisartan franchise product from Crasenim Pharma?
Our cardiac flagship is Telsenim-40 (Telmisartan 40mg with Smartdose™). We also offer combination variants: Telsenim-AM (with Amlodipine) and Telsenim-H (with Hydrochlorothiazide). All are WHO GMP certified and manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS.
Is a cardiac range franchise available in all AP districts?
Yes. The cardiac range franchise is available across the full AP coastal belt from Srikakulam to Vijayawada. Check with our team for specific sub-territory availability in your district.
What is Smartdose™ technology and why does it matter for a franchise?
Smartdose™ is our proprietary controlled-release formulation that ensures 24-hour drug action. For franchise partners, it's a key differentiator vs plain Telmisartan tablets — giving you a genuine USP to present to doctors and why cardiologists prefer Telsenim-40.
Can a cardiac specialist or physician request Telsenim-40 samples?
Yes. Doctors can request samples through our MR in their area or by contacting us directly via WhatsApp at +91 99890 74806. Our field representative will arrange a detailing visit with samples and product literature.

Enquire About Cardiac Range Franchise in AP

Telmisartan franchise, commission-based cardiac MR, and stockist opportunities across Andhra Pradesh. Contact us today.
